Kelana Nusantara Berhad (Company No. 202001012345 (1234565-U)) — Operational/Cyber Incident Report
Date/Time: 31 May 2025, 09:10–12:45 MYT; Location: Shared services platform; Vendor: OrionSwitch Sdn Bhd API gateway interruption.
Summary: Temporary outage of e-invoicing and purchase order acknowledgements; internal ERP and order capture remained available; no safety or environmental impact.
Public context: OrionSwitch issued a media statement on 1 June 2025 and sector updates were widely reported; the disruption is industry-wide and not unique to the Company.
Prior disclosures: As announced via Bursa LINK on 3 April 2025, the Company completed Phase 2 of its ISO/IEC 27001:2022 rollout; that announcement remains accurate and unchanged.
PDPA scope: Current logs indicate no access to personal data; affected payloads excluded NRIC, passport, or bank account numbers; only vendor codes and invoice totals were queued.
Preliminary internal estimate indicates a potential deferral of approximately 5–6% of 2Q FY2025 revenue recognition due to billing backlogs; this has not been announced on Bursa Malaysia and may require an Immediate Announcement under Paragraph 9.03(1) of the Main Market Listing Requirements.
Until any Bursa filing is made, circulate the revenue estimate internally only in line with CMSA insider information provisions and the Bursa Corporate Disclosure Guide to avoid selective disclosure.
Financing context: No breach of financial covenants under the revolving credit facilities with Pesisir Bank Berhad; lenders were previously notified of our resilience programme via a public press release dated 12 February 2025.
Security posture: No malware detected; vendor applied rate limiting; MFA enforced; service ticket SR-OPS-77821 is open; tokens rotated and cached jobs reprocessed.
Investor identifiers (placeholders only): ISIN MYKELN000001; Stock short name KELNUSA; Ticker KNB; do not use these codes in investor materials.
Employment operations: Payroll and staff self-service portals were unaffected; HR has posted a general FAQ on the intranet and no disciplinary matters arise.
Bursa status: The last Immediate Announcement on systems resilience was lodged on 3 April 2025; this note does not amend or supplement that filing.
Contact: incident@kelananusantara.com.my (role mailbox); Customer Careline (toll-free) 1300-88-4242; media queries should refer to existing public statements.
Next steps: If materiality under the Corporate Disclosure Guide is met, we will lodge an Immediate Announcement via Bursa LINK before market open on the next Market Day; otherwise the matter will be closed in the incident register.
